title: PHP Backend Developer — Laravel / Symfony
description: İCT Bilgi Teknolojileri olarak, İstanbul Kartal ofisimizde ofisten çalışacak deneyimli bir PHP Backend Developer ekip arkadaşı arıyoruz. Kurumsal ölçekte geliştirdiğimiz yazılım projelerinde; temiz kod yazmayı önemseyen, sürdürülebilir mimari bakış açısına sahip ve uzun vadeli ürün geliştirme kültürüne uyum sağlayabilecek bir takım arkadaşıyla çalışmak istiyoruz. Senden Beklediklerimiz En az 5 yıl PHP geliştirme deneyimi Laravel ve/veya Symfony framework’lerinden en az biriyle aktif proje geliştirmiş olmak PostgreSQL veritabanı ile çalışma tecrübesi HTML, CSS, JavaScript ve jQuery konularında bilgi sahibi olmak REST ve SOAP web servisleri konusunda deneyim sahibi olmak Git veya SVN gibi versiyon kontrol sistemlerini aktif kullanmış olmak Temiz kod, performans ve sürdürülebilir mimari konularına önem vermek Seni Öne Çıkaracak Deneyimler Agile / Scrum metodolojileri hakkında bilgi sahibi olmak Linux tabanlı ortamlarda çalışma deneyimi Sigorta, finans veya kurumsal ölçekli projelerde görev almış olmak Çalışma Şekli İstanbul / Kartal ofisimizde ofisten çalışma Aday Kriterleri En az 5 yıl deneyim Üniversite mezunu Askerlik görevini tamamlamış veya muaf Biz Ne Sunuyoruz? Kurumsal ve uzun soluklu projelerde görev alma fırsatı Deneyimli bir teknik ekiple çalışma ortamı Gerçek kullanıcı ihtiyacına dokunan ürünler geliştirme imkânı Sürdürülebilir yazılım mimarisi ve temiz kod yaklaşımını önemseyen ekip kültürü

title: Backend & DevOps Developer (Freelance / Part-time)
description: Şirket Hakkında ArchiNord, inşaat sektörüne özel multi-tenant SaaS platformları geliştiren bir teknoloji şirketidir. Sunucu altyapısını yönetecek ve backend/entegrasyon tarafında destek verecek bir geliştirici arıyoruz. Ürün geliştirme ekip içinde yürütülmekte olup, bu rol altyapı ve backend entegrasyonlarına odaklıdır. Sorumluluklar AWS (EC2, S3) altyapı yönetimi ve Linux/Ubuntu sunucu bakımı Deployment süreçleri (CI/CD), Nginx, PHP-FPM ve MySQL optimizasyonu Laravel tabanlı API geliştirme ve üçüncü parti entegrasyonlar Otomatik yedekleme ve sistem izleme (monitoring) kurulumu Sistem sürekliliği ve gerektiğinde acil müdahale (on-call) Aranan Nitelikler Senior PHP / Laravel deneyimi AWS ve Linux production ortam deneyimi Nginx, PHP-FPM, MySQL yapılandırma ve performans optimizasyonu RESTful API ve sunucular arası (server-to-server) entegrasyon deneyimi CI/CD (GitHub Actions) ve Docker bilgisi Çalışma Modeli Aylık retainer esasına dayalı, part-time. Tam zamanlı değildir. Altyapıyı kurup sürdürecek, backend entegrasyonlarında destek verecek ve sistem sürekliliğini sağlayacak deneyimli bir profil aranmaktadır. On-call sorumluluğu mevcuttur.

title: Senior Software Engineer (Full Stack)-İstanbul
description: Who Are We? Profen, founded in 1995, is a global company that offers products and services to the Communication Technologies, Defense Technologies, Teleport & Satellite Network Services, Media & Broadcasting sectors with its growing R&D center. PROFEN, headquartered in Istanbul, offers innovative and high-tech solutions with its Ankara and Konya offices. PROFEN continues its activities by offering solutions in the following areas: Telecommunication Infrastructures Satellite Ground Segment Systems Data Center Design and Installation Defense Technologies Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, or related disciplines 7+ years of professional Java experience in web-based technologies (design, development, and maintenance) Hands-on experience with Java 8, 11, 17, and 21 Proficient in Git and Maven Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience with Amazon AWS Strong experience with relational databases (RDBMS), preferably PostgreSQL Proven experience in SQL query optimization Full-stack development experience with Angular or React on the front-end Solid understanding of RESTful JSON APIs, SOA, and Event-Driven Architectures Experience with container technologies such as Docker, Kubernetes, or OpenShift Familiarity with messaging platforms (Kafka, EMS, ActiveMQ, and/or IBM MQ) Experience with monitoring and alerting tools such as Prometheus, Grafana, and ElasticSearch Preferably experienced in the aviation MRO / logistics domain Ability to read and understand technical documentation in English Job Description Design and develop required enhancements for the existing visioMAX software Identify, troubleshoot, and resolve software defects and performance issues Write and maintain unit and integration test codes Collaborate closely with users and stakeholders to understand software requirements and user needs Manage cloud-based and on-premise deployment, maintenance, and operational support processes Take an active role in designing, developing, and maintaining highly available and resilient applications

title: Software Engineer – Backend and AI R&D
description: We are looking for a talented and motivated Software Engineer to join our R&D team. This position is ideal for an early-career engineer who has a strong interest in backend development, artificial intelligence, computer vision, and model training. At Nevalabs, we develop AI-powered software solutions in areas such as facial recognition, license plate recognition, appearance search, identity verification, object and scene classification, and video analytics. We are looking for a high-potential teammate who is hardworking, detail-oriented, responsible, eager to learn, and willing to grow with our team. Responsibilities Develop and maintain backend software components using Java and/or Python Contribute to scalable, reliable, and maintainable software solutions Work with R&D, AI, frontend, and product teams on new features and product improvements Contribute to AI-related R&D activities, including dataset preparation, data cleaning, model training support, testing, and evaluation Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code Develop unit and integration tests Participate in code reviews and technical discussions Document technical details and development processes Continuously improve technical knowledge in software engineering and AI technologies Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, or a related discipline At least 1 year of professional software development experience (Part-time work experience during university or long-term internship experience may also be considered) Experience with Java and/or Python Good understanding of object-oriented programming Basic knowledge of data structures, algorithms, debugging, and problem-solving Familiarity with RESTful APIs and backend development concepts Knowledge of PostgreSQL and/or MongoDB Experience with Git-based version control systems Interest in artificial intelligence, computer vision, data processing, and model training Strong willingness to learn and improve Detail-oriented and responsible working attitude Ability to work independently and as part of a team Preferred Qualifications Experience with Spring Boot, Spring Data, JPA, or Hibernate Experience with Python backend frameworks such as FastAPI or Flask Familiarity with Docker or containerized development environments Basic knowledge of Linux operating systems and Bash scripting Basic understanding of microservices architecture Experience with unit testing frameworks Familiarity with messaging and caching technologies such as RabbitMQ, ZeroMQ, or Redis Experience with CI/CD tools such as Jenkins is a plus Previous experience or strong interest in AI model training, dataset preparation, or computer vision projects is a plus Experience with Agile development methodologies such as Scrum is a plus Technologies We Use Java, Spring Boot, Gradle Python C++ C# JavaScript, React.js, Backbone.js Git, GitHub MongoDB, PostgreSQL Elasticsearch Docker, Jenkins AI, computer vision, and biometric technologies What We Offer Opportunity to work on real-world AI and computer vision products Hands-on experience in biometric technologies, video analytics, and intelligent security systems A collaborative R&D environment where learning and improvement are encouraged Opportunity to take responsibility and grow technically Experience in both backend software development and AI-focused R&D processes

title: Full Stack Developer (Project-Based Contract - 3 Months)
description: OREDATA is a Digital Transformation & IT Consulting firm with 10+ years of proven expertise and hundreds of successfully implemented projects across the EMEA region. When you join the OREDATA team, you'll be working hand-in-hand with experts focused on tackling digital, operational, analytical & data science challenges with the greatest impact. We foster collaboration with proximity, an agile and autonomous approach and best practices and guiding principles. Read more: https://medium.com/@oredata-engineering Apply and be part of our exciting journey! Role Summary This role is responsible for developing and maintaining scalable full stack applications using modern .NET technologies, contributing to both backend and frontend development processes, and supporting high-traffic enterprise systems with clean and maintainable architectures. Requirements Minimum 5 years of professional software development experience Strong hands-on experience with .NET 9 and modern .NET technologies Proven experience working as a Full Stack Engineer (backend and frontend development) Experience developing and maintaining high-traffic, scalable, and performance-oriented applications Strong understanding of Clean Architecture principles and software design patterns Hands-on experience with Entity Framework and CQRS architecture patterns Strong experience with MSSQL and MongoDB (NoSQL) databases, including query optimization and performance tuning Experience implementing caching solutions using Memcache or similar caching technologies Experience integrating IBM MQ / Message Broker systems within .NET environments Experience working on system integration projects and enterprise application architectures Strong frontend development experience with JavaScript, jQuery, HTML5, and CSS Ability to write clean, scalable, maintainable, and performance-oriented code Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills Ability to work independently in remote and project-based environments Strong Experience Experience working on SAP Hybris integration projects using .NET Experience working on enterprise-scale distributed systems Experience with high-performance backend optimization and scalable system design Get to know us If you want to know more about us and what we do, then visit our website: www.oredata.com Why Oredata? Remote working and flexible time off Open communication, flexibility and start-up spirit Learning & Development opportunities for both personal and professional growth Opportunity to get company paid Professional Certificates (Google Cloud Platform, Confluent Kafka, etc) Access to Online Training Platforms (Udemy, Pluralsight, A Cloud Guru, Coursera, etc.) Dynamic work ecosystem where you can take initiative and responsibility Opportunity to work on international projects Private Health Insurance Birthday Leave Policy Kişisel verileriniz işe alım sürecinin yürütülebilmesi amacıyla veri sorumlusu sıfatıyla şirketimiz Oredata Yazılım A.Ş. tarafından işlenecektir. Kişisel verilerinizin işlenmesi ve haklarınızla ilgili detaylı bilgiye https://oredata.com/personal-data-protection-policy/ bağlantısı üzerinden ulaşabilirsiniz.
